placement.existing_section: the ShopiFixer Command Center panel rendered inside <section className="panel operatorHomeDetails" style={{ marginTop: 18 }}>
placement.rendering_strategy: extend the existing read-only ShopiFixer panel in place; do not add a route, modal, drawer, or separate workbench page

extendable_cards.extension: add a read-only fulfillment workbench subsection beneath the existing audit/offer/payment summary
reuse the existing card structure for the fulfillment lane and status stack, without adding controls

smallest_implementation: Render a dedicated read-only fulfillment workbench subsection inside the existing ShopiFixer Command Center panel, backed only by merchant_lifecycle_registry_v1.json and fulfillment truth.
notes: The existing command-center structure already contains the active merchant summary area needed for this panel.
No new navigation or route is required.
The lifecycle lane is already precomputed in merchant_lifecycle_registry_v1.json.
